name: NIST Cybersecurity Framework 2.0
note: Used as general cybersecurity risk management framework.

name: NIST IR 8374r1 draft - Ransomware Risk Management
note: Used as additional ransomware risk management context for the project methodology.

name: CISA StopRansomware Guide
note: Used for ransomware prevention, response and recovery guidance.

name: NCSC ransomware guidance
note: Used for backup, MFA, remote access and incident response guidance.

name: NCSC cyber threat heightened guidance
note: Used for practical prioritization around patching, access review and partner access control.

name: CIS Critical Security Controls v8
note: Used for practical implementation-oriented security controls.

name: MITRE ATT&CK T1486 - Data Encrypted for Impact
note: Used to explain ransomware impact technique mapping, not as a direct scoring engine.

name: Personal security hygiene checklist
note: Used for optional employee hygiene questions that do not affect official score.
